name: management
description: Product and project management discipline for the NVZver marketplace — shaping vague ideas into buildable pitches before the build cycle begins. Ships a product-manager agent that drives interactive shaping conversations: dynamically adapts its domain-expert role, extracts requirements from the user, grounds decisions in the codebase, and produces structured pitches per management/knowledge/pitch-structure.md. Entry point: management:start-feature skill. Depends on core (ground-rules, output).
